title: McDonald's
html: Stub. First mentioned in 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf. Heavy presence in the BroMenu seed dataset — almost the entire breakfast lineup (Sausage McMuffin family, McGriddles family, Egg McMuffin, McCrispy variants, McChicken Deluxe, Fruit & Maple Oatmeal, Impossible Breakfast Sandwich).
